listings.title: General Electric WE21X20562 Dryer Drum Assembly for HTDX100ED3WW
listings.consumer_description: This is a genuine General Electric drum assembly designed specifically for your dryer. It serves as the primary vessel for your laundry and is constructed to restore smooth, quiet operation to your machine.
listings.expert_trust_shard: Replacing a dryer drum is a significant repair. Before installing, I highly recommend inspecting the drum glides and the felt seals on your dryer housing. If the old drum was scored, those original glides are likely worn down to the metal and will immediately damage your brand-new drum if not replaced at the same time.
listings.html_description_block:
GE Dryer Drum Assembly - WE21X20562

Restore your dryer to factory-standard performance with this genuine GE drum assembly. Designed for durability and perfect fitment, this component solves persistent issues caused by structural wear or damage.

Symptoms Resolved:

  • Noisy, rattling, or squealing during cycles
  • Drum failing to rotate or uneven rotation
  • Visible dents, cracks, or scoring inside the drum
  • Excessive machine vibration

Expert Installation Tip:

Pro Technician Advice: Replacing the drum is a major operation. Always check your dryer's glide strips and felt seals before finishing the assembly. If these components are worn, they can cause friction and rapid damage to your new drum. Replacing these inexpensive parts now will save you a massive headache later.

listings.title: Hotpoint Dryer Backsplash Graphics WE19M1713 OEM Genuine Part
symptoms_fixed: Faded or damaged control console graphics
Cracked or scratched backsplash display area
listings.consumer_description: This is a genuine Hotpoint Backsplash Graphics assembly, designed to restore the control panel area of your dryer to its original appearance. It features clear, durable labeling for your cycle settings and serves as the visual face of your control interface.
listings.expert_trust_shard: When installing this backsplash panel, take care to document or photograph your current wiring harness connections before removing the old unit. Since you will be transferring existing control knobs and potentially sensitive interface boards, work on a soft, clean surface to prevent accidental scratching of the new finish.
listings.html_description_block:
Product Overview

Restore the professional look of your Hotpoint dryer with this genuine OEM Backsplash Graphics assembly (Part Number: WE19M1713). Perfect for replacing worn, faded, or damaged consoles, this part ensures your cycle settings remain clear and easy to read.

Symptoms Addressed:

  • Faded or unreadable control console labels
  • Visible cracks or deep scratches on the backsplash area

Expert Installation Tip

From a professional technician: Before starting the installation, take a quick photo of the wiring behind the current console. This acts as your map during reassembly. When swapping over your dials and electronics, handle the components gently—plastic clips can become brittle over time. Always work on a clean, padded surface to keep your brand-new backsplash looking pristine.
